GenAiPromptTemplate.description: This prompt template summarizes the generated report.

templateVersions.content:
### Overall Goal: Please summarize the following report into at most 5 bullet points. If you are directed to summarize a specific section please only summarize that specific section.
### Goal Details: I only need you to focus on summarizing the content of the report or the specific report section. If your summary uses a piece of hyperlinked information or a citation, you must preserve that clickable hyperlink/citation in your summary.
### Formatting Details: The formatting of the summary should be rich text formatted. Do not include the section header or the title of what you summarized. I just want the summary bullet points. Please write the summary in HTML formatting. Do not start your HTML with this (```html) or end with triple quotes (```).
### Content to Summarize: {!$Input:Content_to_Summarize}

Please summarize the following report into at most 5 bullet points. If you are directed to summarize a specific section please only summarize that specific section.
The formatting of the summary should be rich text formatted.
Content to Summarize:
{!$Input:Content_to_Summarize}

Overall Goal: Please summarize the following report into at most 5 bullet points. If you are directed to summarize a specific section please only summarize that specific section.
Goal Details: I only need you to focus on summarizing the content of the report or the specific report section. If your summary uses a piece of hyperlinked information or a citation, you must preserve that clickable hyperlink/citation in your summary.
Formatting Details: The formatting of the summary should be rich text formatted. Please write the summary in HTML formatting. Do not start your HTML with this (```html) or end with triple quotes (```).
{!$Input:Content_to_Summarize}

### Overall Goal: Please summarize the following report into at most 5 bullet points. If you are directed to summarize a specific section please only summarize that specific section.
### Goal Details: I only need you to focus on summarizing the content of the report or the specific report section. If your summary uses a piece of hyperlinked information or a citation, you must preserve that clickable hyperlink/citation in your summary.
### Formatting Details: The formatting of the summary should be rich text formatted. Please write the summary in HTML formatting. Do not start your HTML with this (```html) or end with triple quotes (```).
### Content to Summarize: {!$Input:Content_to_Summarize}

### Overall Goal: Please summarize the following report into at most 5 bullet points. If you are directed to summarize a specific section please only summarize that specific section.
### Goal Details: I only need you to focus on summarizing the content of the report or the specific report section. If your summary uses a piece of hyperlinked information or a citation, you must preserve that clickable hyperlink/citation in your summary.
### Formatting Details: The formatting of the summary should be rich text formatted. Do not include the section header or the title of what you summarized. I just want the summary bullet points. Please write the summary in HTML formatting. Do not start your HTML with this (```html) or end with triple quotes (```).
### Content to Summarize: {!$Input:Content_to_Summarize}
